close_reason: Implemented MetadataMerge module with TDD - 13 new tests, parses system keys and updates ETS shard_table + metadata
description:
The metadata distribution pipeline needs a real merge_fn that populates routing data.

## What merge_fn must do

Parse system key mutations and update proxy State:

1. **Shard routing** - `\xff/system/shard_keys/{end_key}` → update ETS shard_table
2. **Log routing** - `\xff/system/layout/logs/{log_id}` → update log_map and log_services
3. **Replication factor** - derive from log count or explicit key

## Why this matters

With minimal proxy startup (just epoch, sequencer, resolver_layout), ALL routing data comes from metadata returned by resolver. The merge_fn populates the routing tables BEFORE log push happens.

## Flow

1. Transaction → resolver (with commit version)
2. Resolver returns metadata mutations
3. merge_fn applies mutations → routing data now available
4. Log push uses routing data from State

## Files

- server.ex - implement merge_fn in handle_info(:metadata_update, ...)
- state.ex - log_services field (already has shard_table, log_map, replication_factor)
- system_keys.ex - key parsing helpers

## Prerequisite

Depends on bedrock-as6j (system key schema) - DONE
title: Implement real metadata_merge_fn in commit proxy
